title: Indulgent Egyptian Beef Shin Stew
description: A creamy, midnight-craving stew featuring tender beef shin and yogurt pearls, served in scallop-shell vessels.

ingredients.name: Spice mix
ingredients.notes: cumin 2 tsp, coriander 2 tsp, turmeric 1 tsp, salt 1 tsp, pepper 0.5 tsp

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until translucent.
Stir in garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add beef cubes and brown on all sides.
Pour in tomato puree, red wine, and spice mix; simmer until wine reduces by half.
Add beef stock, cover, and simmer on low for 90 minutes until meat is tender.
Soak bulgur in warm water for 20 minutes, then drain.
Stir bulgur into stew and simmer 15 more minutes until bulgur is cooked.
Whisk yogurt into a separate bowl and chill.
Prepare calcium chloride solution and drop yogurt into it to form pearls; strain and rinse.
Ladle stew into scallop-shell vessels, top with yogurt pearls, and garnish with cilantro.
Serve hot, letting the creamy pearls burst with flavor.
